dealerDisplayList.title: dealerDisplayList
dealerDisplayList.description: Clean numbered list of dealers with city and state on separate lines. Display this exactly as returned to the user without any modification or reformatting.

dealerIdMap.title: dealerIdMap
dealerIdMap.description:
Number to IDs mapping in format
1##dealerId##vdaId||2##dealerId##vdaId.
Split on || to get entries then split each
entry on ## to get:
Part 1 = number
Part 2 = dealerId (Account ID starts with 001)
Part 3 = vdaId (VehicleDef_Dealer junction record ID)
Store both silently. Never show to user.
CRITICAL: Part 2 is ALWAYS dealerId.
Part 3 is ALWAYS vdaId. Never mix them up.

message.title: message
message.description: Status message indicating whether dealers were found near pincode or all dealers are being shown.

pincodeMatched.title: pincodeMatched
pincodeMatched.description: True if dealers were found matching the user pincode exactly. False if showing all available dealers because no pincode match was found.

totalCount.title: totalCount
totalCount.description: Total number of dealers found for this vehicle and pincode combination.
